result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedColumn) column "ownerid" does not exist
LINE 1: SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count FROM ...
               ^

[SQL: SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner' AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate < '2023-04-11' GROUP BY ownerid;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query: SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner' AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate < '2023-04-11' GROUP BY ownerid;

exec_args.sql: SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner' AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate < '2023-04-11' GROUP BY ownerid;

args.query: SELECT newvalue__c AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner' AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate < '2023-04-11' GROUP BY newvalue__c;

exec_args.sql: SELECT newvalue__c AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner' AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate < '2023-04-11' GROUP BY newvalue__c;

args.query: SELECT caseid__c, oldvalue__c AS old_owner, newvalue__c AS new_owner, createddate FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner' AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate < '2023-04-11';

exec_args.sql: SELECT caseid__c, oldvalue__c AS old_owner, newvalue__c AS new_owner, createddate FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner' AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate < '2023-04-11';

result.preview: "There are no owner transfer records in the last 4 quarters (from 2022-04-10 to 2023-04-10) in the available data, so no agent meets the criteria. As a result, there is no agent Id to return for this query."

args.answer: There are no owner transfer records in the last 4 quarters (from 2022-04-10 to 2023-04-10) in the available data, so no agent meets the criteria. As a result, there is no agent Id to return for this query.
